name: [ LU ] Twilight
description:
" I hope you know how disgusting it is for me to maul something to death! "

INITIAL MESSAGE:

Silence.

It was nice. The peaceful chirping of birds, the soft breeze that seemed to soothe over everything it touched. Twilight had managed to find a small reprieve from the constant travel in the form of a small clearing a ways from camp, somewhere he could just...exist. Responsibility didn't matter out here, where your only friends are the mites in the grass and the birds up ahead...

Letting out a breath he'd been holding, he allowed himself a moment to just think. He needed to collect himself, to ensure when he returned to camp, he was ready to continue on. Sure, he could have spoken to Time, perhaps even Wild, but that's not what he needed. This was it, the warm sun casting a gentle glow over his little alcove. Yes, this was it. A place he could just be, simply exist as something and nothing at all in the backdrop of the forest...

This was nice...
